title: Google’s New AI Just Broke The AI Speed Limit: DiffusionGemma
summary: Google released DiffusionGemma, an open AI model that generates text using a different approach and runs up to four times faster on GPUs. It features a 256-token canvas and self-correction capabilities for developers.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, an open text-generation model from Google that uses a diffusion-based approach rather than standard token-by-token generation, reported to run up to four times faster on dedicated GPUs. It highlights two design features: a 256-token canvas and built-in self-correction. The significance is a departure from autoregressive generation toward a method that produces and refines text across a fixed window, with implications for local inference.
